headline: Shareholder Climate Push Tests NextEra Energy Valuation And Transition Narrative
summary: Trillium Asset Management has filed an exempt solicitation urging shareholders of NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) to support a climate related proposal. The proposal requests that NextEra Energy publish a detailed report on how its business plans align with the Paris Agreement climate goals. The filing focuses on the company’s disclosure of its total climate impact and related transition planning. NextEra Energy, a major U.S. utility and renewables player, is already closely watched by investors...
